themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "Son of man, set thy face toward the mountains of Israel, and prophesy against them, God comma...". Word-study detail reinforces "וְיֶאְשְׁמ֜וּ: and made desolate - to be guilty; by implication to be punished or perish".

themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "He that is far off shall die of the pestilence; and he that is near shall fall by the sword;...". Word-study detail reinforces "וְהַקָּרוֹב֙: and he that is near - near (in place, kindred or time)".
